title: GO! LEAD - 211info
text: HEART OF OREGON CORPS GO! LEAD Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers employment opportunities, job training, and environmental education for youth interested in Camp LEAD or have attended in the past. Participants are paid to help maintain public recreation areas and learn about outdoor related careers. Employment takes place at Camp LEAD, and participants have opportunities to engage in activities, play games, hone camp skills, and make friends. 1291 NE 5th Street Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Ages 16-24 experiencing a disability Hours: Varies Email (541) 633-7834 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 633-7834 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Deschutes, Crook, and Jefferson Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Camps * Disabilities Issues Youth Employment Programs * Disabilities Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - CENTRAL OREGON YOUTH CONSERVATION CORPS EMPLOYMENT - FOOD HEROS EMPLOYMENT - HIGH DESERT CONSERVATION CORPS EMPLOYMENT - YEAR-ROUND PROGRAMS EMPLOYMENT - YOUTHBUILD If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
